tone: Premium, Characterful, Enthusiast-driven (Italian passion/red + motorbike adrenaline)

headings.primary: Oswald, sans-serif (Aggressive, automotive, condensed - used for bold impact)
headings.secondary: Playfair Display, serif (Elegant, Italian heritage - used for 'Alfa Romeo' and luxury storytelling)

rules: H1 must be fluid text-5xl to text-7xl with tracking-tighter.
Use Playfair Display in italic (font-serif italic) to contrast strongly against Oswald.
Never use Inter or Roboto for headings.

colors.rules: Adhere strictly to a dark, cinematic palette. The 'Rosso Corsa' (Red) is used ONLY as a kinetic trigger (CTAs, precise lines, active states). The background is deep obsidian, not pure black (#000000).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, and py-24 or py-32 for section separation.

grids.name: The Asymmetrical 60/40 Split (Hero)
grids.description: Desktop: Left side (Bikes) takes up 60% of width, Right side (Cars) takes 40%. This physically guarantees the 'MORE emphasis on motorbike sales' requirement. Mobile: Stack vertically with Bikes first.

grids.name: Bento Tetris (Motorcycle Showcase)
grids.description: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. One massive 'Hero' bike spanning col-span-8 row-span-2. Others spanning col-span-4.

surface_strategies: Crystal Glass: For the sticky Navigation. bg-[#050505]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10.
Grid Borders (Technical Layout): For 'Why Choose Us' and stats. border-r border-b border-white/10 to show mechanical precision.

components.name: Sticky Navbar
components.rules: Glassmorphism. Must contain Logo, Links (Cars, Bikes, Servicing), and a solid Red CTA button with Phone numbers: 01254 875970.

components.name: Hero Section
components.rules: min-h-screen. 60/40 horizontal split. Left: Massive 'TWO WHEELS' text over Ducati image. Right: 'FOUR WHEELS' over Alfa Romeo image. Hovering either side slightly expands it.

components.name: Editorial Marquee
components.rules: Use framer-motion or react-fast-marquee. Text: 'ALFA ROMEO SPECIALIST • PREMIUM USED BIKES • SPECIALIST SERVICING'. Font: Playfair Display. Slow drift.

components.name: Bikes Showcase Grid
components.rules: Bento Tetris grid. High visual density. Use large red accents and Oswald font for numbers/prices.

components.name: Alfa Romeo Showcase
components.rules: Editorial, magazine-style layout. 1 massive image, generous whitespace (or darkspace), Playfair Display typography to ooze heritage.

components.name: Specialist Servicing Section
components.rules: Dark, gritty, mechanical. Use the vintage car repair image. High contrast.

components.name: Footer
components.rules: Massive 'LET'S TALK' text (text-[10vw]). Full contact details: 01254 875970 / 07412 707606.

hero_bikes.description: Biker on red Ducati in illuminated city. High energy, dark background.

hero_cars.description: Red sports car highlighted in darkness. Cinematic.

alfa_emblem.description: Alfa Romeo emblem close up. Perfect for the 'Alfa Romeo Specialist' section.

mechanic_servicing.description: Vintage car repair, dark and mechanical.

showroom_bikes_1.description: Red sport motorcycle displayed indoors on a mat.

showroom_bikes_2.description: Red and black sports bike in dark garage.

motion_and_interactions: Hover states: Image scaling (transform scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers.
Page load: Staggered fade-up for typography using framer-motion.
Section transitions: Smooth scroll with lenis.
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards. Use text-shadow on text placed over images.
Include aria-labels on purely decorative images.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, and forms.
instructions_to_main_agent: This is a frontend static HTML/CSS (React/Tailwind) project. The app is already initialized. Use .js extensions, NOT .tsx.
Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react react-fast-marquee lenis`.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn components (like Card) for the Hero or Vehicle Showcases. Build custom div structures to allow asymmetrical overlaps.
Add 'dark' class to html/body. This site is exclusively Dark Mode.
Apply optical alignment over geometrical alignment.
Ensure images never exceed 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking content.
For the Hero Split, implement it as a flex or grid layout that guarantees Bikes (left) is visually larger or equal to Cars (right).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements only.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp buttons with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
NEVER use placeholder images or logos. Use the provided image URLs.
